text.text:
We had driven by this place serveral times and finally decided to try it out. When we arrived, there was a tablet for you to check in and wait for the host to seat you.

When we were seated, the waiter gave us a tablet to place our order.  We went with The Classic Plate, which you can choose two broths, three types of meats, three sides, two rice or noodles, and one veggie platter for $75.

For the broths, we chose Buttery spicy and Tom Yum. Our meats were Wagyu Beef Toro, New Zealand Lamb, Prime Black Angus Beef Short Ribs for the meats. For sides, we had the Black Tiger Shrimp (Shell On), Beef Tripe and Shrimp Paste, along with the House Ramen and the Udon Noodle.

Both broths tasted amazing. The Buttery Spicy broth had great depth, it wasn't just spicy, but also fragrant with a slight numbling sensation. The Tom Yum tasted really good as well that bringing out the flavor of the meat without being too greasy.

The meat quality was pretty good, sliced into a nice thickness and held together well while cooking. Highly recommended!

*Parking can be difficut, but there is a plaza across the restaurant with plenty of free parking if you don't mind a 5 min walk.

text.text:
The food at mumu was epic. The meats were all high quality. The veggie was also fresh and the lunch deal is 75 for 2. It also comes with veggies included.

We tried the Sichuan and tom yum soup bases.

The dipping sauce station was nice with good variety including mushroom sauce, satay sauce, chilli crisp, hoisin sauce, ponzu etc.

The fishballs with roe, cuttlefish and fish tofu were my the favorite sides.

Imo food quality was similar to hidilao.

Service was prompt and friendly.

Decor is modern and minimal. You get your own personal hotpot so everyone doesn't have to have consensus on a single soup base. Imo this is a major selling point over having hotpot at home.

Will probably be back.

text.text: Never had hot pot before and this place was outstanding!  The staff were kind enough to educate me on how this process was done.  Come hungry because they give you a lot of food.  The food was of an excellent quality and delicious.  The sauce bar was plentiful and well-stocked.  The soup bases were many as were the sides.  Expect to be here no less than 90 minutes to truly enjoy this experience.

Expect to be here no less than 90 minutes to truly enjoy this experience.

text.text:
Decided to come after seeing the beautiful interior walking down Bay St. We got the mumu meat lover for 2 and got a mushroom and miso soup base. The service was quick and came out with a plate of vegetables and our sides we ordered. The meat quality was overall pretty good, I believe we ordered the pork, wagyu beef and lamb. Our favorite was the wagyu beef. The set also came with noodles which was great. The mushroom soup and miso soup base were very good.

I had tried the yuzu shio my second visit and I think it's my favorite! The second visit we ordered the beef short rib, chuck and wagyu again. Out of those, I enjoyed the chuck the most.

We also always get a grape slushy with milk foam drink that is really refreshing and pairs pretty well with the meaty hot pot! Overall, we were stuffed by the end, and the value was pretty good for the amount of extra sides and drink we ordered in addition to the set. Would love to come back!

text.text:
I’m sharing this as a business owner who wants to see this place succeed.

Food quality was solid and the concept is strong. We enjoy hot pot often and the experience shows good potential.

This visit had a few operational gaps that are easy to fix:
•	Wait time was about 45 minutes for a party of 6
•	18% service charge is applied upfront. That sets expectations for consistent service
•	Water refills were slow. We had to signal multiple times. The manager helped when available
•	Spice station needs frequent cleaning. Spills were visible and not addressed quickly
•	Empty plates stayed on the table too long. This impacts comfort and table turnover

Simple improvements would make a big difference:
•	Assign rotation for spice station checks every 10–15 minutes
•	Add a clear system for water refills
•	Bus tables more actively during service
•	Align service level with the fixed service charge

I was going to give 4 stars, but leaving 3 to make sure this feedback gets attention. I will come back and hope to update this after improvements.
